name: Security State Bank
description_short: Sutherland, IA's Security State Bank at 109 W 2Nd St provides convenient personal and business banking.
description_long:
Security State Bank maintains a branch at 109 W 2Nd St in Sutherland, IA, serving the local community with retail and business banking solutions. This standalone branch location provides a convenient in-person banking hub for residents and local businesses. While specific hours are not published online, the branch operates during regular business days.

Customers at this Sutherland banking location can access deposit products, personal loans, and other banking services. The branch team is available to help with account openings, loan applications, and day-to-day banking needs. Visit the downtown Sutherland office to discuss your banking requirements with experienced staff.

For Sutherland residents looking for accessible banking in Iowa, this location offers direct, in-person service. Bring your identification when visiting for account services or transactions. Security State Bank provides dependable community banking for personal and business customers.
services: 24/7 debit card support and fraud reporting
pros: Long-established institution with 90+ years of operating history and community presence since 1931
Locally-owned and operated with emphasis on local community involvement and decision-making
Mobile banking app available for remote account access and management
Online banking enrollment available for convenient digital account access
24/7 after-hours support line (800-383-8000) for debit card issues and emergencies
Multiple branch locations with personalized service from local staff
No cookies used for advertising or tracking purposes on their website
cons: Website provides minimal information about specific product features, rates, or fees
Website navigation errors (broken services page) limit ability to research offerings
Limited online presence and product transparency compared to larger regional banks
Banking hours vary by branch and must be checked on individual Facebook pages rather than centralized site
No clear information about minimum deposit requirements, account types, or service charges
best_for: Customers in Sutherland area and surrounding communities seeking local banking relationships
Individuals who prefer community bank service over large national institutions
Homebuyers interested in working with local loan officers for mortgage applications
diagnosis: Security State Bank is best suited for customers in the Sutherland area seeking traditional banking services from an established local institution with 90+ years of history. The primary caveat is that their website offers limited product detail, competitive rate information, or comprehensive service descriptions, requiring direct branch contact for specific financial decisions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_holding_company: OLD O BRIEN BANC SHARES INC
meta_description: Security State Bank at 109 W 2Nd St, Sutherland, IA. Convenient personal and business banking.
